arts.ttl: Barcelona Make Surprising U-Turn, Open Contract Talks With €19M-per-Year PSG Target
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona is still up in the air as he enters the final year of his contract. Several European clubs have shown interest, with one Premier League team reportedly making him a top target. Last October, SPORT revealed that Manchester United, Chelsea, Bayern Munich, and Paris Saint-Germain were all monitoring de […] The post Barcelona Make Surprising U-Turn, Open Contract Talks With €19M-per-Year PSG Target appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers Reveals Mindset Aston Villa Will Have Facing PSG in Champions League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain clinched their 13th Ligue 1 title on Saturday with a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Angers at Parc des Princes. While PSG celebrated, their upcoming opponent in Wednesday’s UEFA Champions League could be getting a boost to their squad. PSG dominated the first half, registering 11 shots compared to just two from Angers. However, […] The post Morgan Rogers Reveals Mindset Aston Villa Will Have Facing PSG in Champions League appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Paris St Germain clinch title while Real Madrid slip leaves Barcelona four clear
arts.sum: Second-placed Monaco lost at Brest to leave PSG an unassailable 24 points clear in Ligue 1.
